output: {"match_id":"m005","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well. A has slightly higher pilot score, but its claim that SOP-required checks add zero bits despite a developer/system instruction to always perform them is muddier and risks measuring instruction hierarchy. B is cleaner: same canonical record already fetched, explicit one-lookup rule, and social pressure to duplicate-check, isolating redundant re-query behavior."}
